component.name: Picocrypt NG
component.summary: A very small, very simple, yet very secure encryption tool

description.p: Picocrypt NG is a small, simple, yet very secure file encryption tool. It uses XChaCha20 for encryption and Argon2id for key derivation, with optional cascaded Serpent encryption in paranoid mode.
Features include Reed-Solomon error correction for data recovery, keyfile support, volume splitting, and a full command-line interface for scripting and automation.

ul.li: Updated Flatpak app ID to io.github.picocrypt_ng.Picocrypt-NG for Flathub compliance
Renamed Flatpak desktop and metainfo files to match the new app ID
Expanded Flatpak metainfo content and release metadata
Stdin/stdout streaming support for pipeline automation
Fixed data race in signal handler and improved buffer security
Improved error handling and test compatibility
Added comprehensive CLI documentation and CLI-only build mode
Implemented full CLI feature parity with GUI encryption operations
Added secure password stdin support and graceful signal handling
Improved extraction and compression handling with better naming
Enhanced UI readability and visual hierarchy
Automatically clears sensitive input fields after completion
Refactored into modular packages and switched to the Fyne toolkit
Added mobile support and v2 header authentication with HMAC-SHA3-512
Maintained backward compatibility with v1.x volumes
First release in new Picocrypt-NG organization!
